message.content:
You are reviewing whether an implementation matches its specification.

## What Was Requested

Create `~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md` with:
- YAML frontmatter with `name: fabrica-de-criativos` and a description starting with "Use when..."
- 5 specialist prompt engineers: Anúncios, Criativo, Psicodélico, Pessoas, Cena
- Each specialist must have: Quando usar, Estrutura canônica, Vocabulário, Evitar, Exemplo (simples → expandido)
- Replicate model reference table: 5 image models (flux-1.1-pro, flux-dev, recraft-v3, ideogram-v3-turbo, imagen-4) and 6 video models (wan-t2v-fast, wan-5b-fast, hailuo-02, seedance-lite, runway-gen4, wan-i2v-fast)
- Endpoint and polling instructions

## What Implementer Claims

Created `/root/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md` with all 5 specialists, Replicate model reference, frontmatter YAML.

## Your Job

Read the actual file at `/root/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md` and verify all requirements are present.

Report:
- ✅ Spec compliant
- ❌ Issues found: [list specifically what's missing]

content.text: I'll read the actual file and verify it against the specification.

content.content:
1→---
     2→name: fabrica-de-criativos
     3→description: Use when generating AI images or videos for ad creatives, needing prompt engineering for Replicate models, or working on the Jake OS Fábrica de Criativos feature. Provides 5 specialized prompt engineers (Anúncios, Criativo, Psicodélico, Pessoas, Cena) and Replicate model reference.
     4→---
     5→
     6→# Fábrica de Criativos — Prompt Engineering Skill
     7→
     8→## Overview
     9→
    10→5 engenheiros de prompt especializados para geração de criativos com IA. Cada especialista expande um prompt simples em português para um prompt técnico profissional em inglês, otimizado para o tipo de criativo.
    11→
    12→**Regra universal:** Sempre gerar o prompt expandido em **inglês**. Manter o prompt expandido entre 50–120 palavras. Incluir sempre: sujeito principal, iluminação, estilo fotográfico/artístico, câmera/lente (quando aplicável), mood/atmosfera.
    13→
    14→---
    15→
    16→## Os 5 Especialistas
    17→
    18→### 🎯 Anúncios
    19→**Quando usar:** Criativos para Meta Ads, Google Ads, produtos, serviços, clínicas, negócios locais.
    20→
    21→**Estrutura canônica:**
    22→`[produto/serviço] advertisement, [sujeito + ação], [iluminação: studio/rim/softbox], [câmera: Canon/Sony 85mm f/1.4], commercial photography style, [background: clean/white/gradient], [color grading: warm/cool/neutral], [emoção: trust/confident/welcoming], Meta Ads format`
    23→
    24→**Vocabulário:** studio lighting, rim light, commercial photography, shallow depth of field, trust-inspiring, clean background, product hero shot, brand colors
    25→
    26→**Evitar:** artsy, experimental, surreal, cluttered backgrounds, dark moody tones
    27→
    28→**Exemplo:**
    29→- Simples: "clínica odontológica sorriso"
    30→- Expandido: "Professional dental clinic advertisement, confident woman smiling with perfect white teeth, soft studio lighting with rim light, shallow depth of field, Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.4, commercial photography style, clean white background, warm color grading, trust-inspiring composition, Meta Ads format"
    31→
    32→---
    33→
    34→### 🎨 Conteúdo Criativo
    35→**Quando usar:** Arte conceitual, posts de redes sociais com apelo estético, storytelling visual, marcas de moda/lifestyle.
    36→
    37→**Estrutura canônica:**
    38→`[conceito] conceptual art, [sujeito + contexto], [composição: bold/dynamic/layered], [estilo: editorial/National Geographic/fine art], [iluminação: golden hour/dramatic/cinematic], [mood: narrative/emotional/striking], [técnica: high contrast/color grading]`
    39→
    40→**Vocabulário:** conceptual art, editorial style, bold composition, visual narrative, dynamic lighting, color contrast, fine art photography, storytelling
    41→
    42→**Evitar:** genérico, stock photo look, plain backgrounds sem intenção
    43→
    44→**Exemplo:**
    45→- Simples: "mulher e natureza"
    46→- Expandido: "Editorial conceptual art, woman merging with lush tropical nature, bold color contrast, dynamic composition, National Geographic style, golden hour lighting, environmental storytelling, high contrast shadows, award-winning photography"
    47→
    48→---
    49→
    50→### 🌀 Psicodélico
    51→**Quando usar:** Arte generativa, covers musicais, conteúdo alternativo, eventos, marcas disruptivas.
    52→
    53→**Estrutura canônica:**
    54→`psychedelic [tema], [geometria: fractal/kaleidoscope/spiral], [paleta: neon/vibrant/cosmic], [referência: DMT-inspired/surrealist/dreamscape], ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, [técnica: liquid geometry/morphing/infinite recursion]`
    55→
    56→**Vocabulário:** psychedelic, fractal geometry, neon colors, surrealist, kaleidoscope, liquid geometry, cosmic, DMT-inspired, interdimensional, crystalline
    57→
    58→**Evitar:** fotorrealismo, tons apagados, composição convencional
    59→
    60→**Exemplo:**
    61→- Simples: "portal dimensional"
    62→- Expandido: "Psychedelic dimensional portal, fractal geometry spiraling into infinite cosmos, neon cyan and magenta hues, liquid geometry morphing, DMT-inspired visuals, ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, surrealist dreamscape, kaleidoscope symmetry, cosmic interdimensional gateway"
    63→
    64→---
    65→
    66→### 👤 Pessoas Realistas
    67→**Quando usar:** Retratos, personas de cliente, modelos para anúncios, conteúdo com pessoas.
    68→
    69→**Estrutura canônica:**
    70→`Hyperrealistic portrait, [sujeito: idade/gênero/etnia/expressão], [iluminação: Rembrandt/natural window/golden hour], skin texture with subsurface scattering, [câmera: Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.2], shallow depth of field, [contexto/roupa], [mood: candid/professional/authentic]`
    71→
    72→**Vocabulário:** hyperrealistic, skin texture, subsurface scattering, natural light, bokeh, candid, Rembrandt lighting, photojournalism, authentic expression, pore detail
    73→
    74→**Evitar:** AI-looking skin, plastic textures, symmetria perfeita demais, olhos artificiais
    75→
    76→**Exemplo:**
    77→- Simples: "homem de negócios confiante"
    78→- Expandido: "Hyperrealistic portrait, confident businessman mid-40s, natural window light with Rembrandt lighting, skin texture with subsurface scattering, Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.2, shallow depth of field, professional business attire, authentic expression, photojournalism style, 8K resolution"
    79→
    80→---
    81→
    82→### 🌆 Cena/Ambiente
    83→**Quando usar:** Paisagens urbanas, natureza, arquitetura, cenários para fundo de anúncios.
    84→
    85→**Estrutura canônica:**
    86→`Cinematic [tipo de cena], [horário/luz: golden hour/blue hour/overcast], [técnica de composição: leading lines/rule of thirds/symmetry], [efeito: volumetric light/atmospheric haze/long exposure], wide angle [mm], [referência: award-winning landscape/National Geographic], [mood: epic/serene/dramatic]`
    87→
    88→**Vocabulário:** wide angle, leading lines, atmospheric perspective, golden hour, volumetric light, establishing shot, rule of thirds, long exposure, atmospheric haze
    89→
    90→**Evitar:** composições planas, luz plana sem drama, perspectiva de smartphone
    91→
    92→**Exemplo:**
    93→- Simples: "cidade no pôr do sol"
    94→- Expandido: "Cinematic cityscape at golden hour, dramatic volumetric light rays, leading lines from architecture into infinite horizon, atmospheric haze, wide angle 16mm, rule of thirds composition, long exposure light trails, urban landscape photography, award-winning composition, National Geographic style"
    95→
    96→---
    97→
    98→## Replicate — Model IDs e Parâmetros
    99→
   100→### Imagem
   101→
   102→| Key | Slug | Melhor para | aspect_ratio padrão |
   103→|---|---|---|---|
   104→| `flux-1.1-pro` | `black-forest-labs/flux-1.1-pro` | Anúncios, Pessoas | 4:5 |
   105→| `flux-dev` | `black-forest-labs/flux-dev` | Criativo, qualidade alta | 4:5 |
   106→| `recraft-v3` | `recraft-ai/recraft-v3` | Design, UI, vetorial | 1:1 |
   107→| `ideogram-v3-turbo` | `ideogram-ai/ideogram-v3-turbo` | Texto em imagem, logos | 1:1 |
   108→| `imagen-4` | `google/imagen-4` | Fotorrealismo máximo | 4:5 |
   109→
   110→**Endpoint padrão imagem:** `POST https://api.replicate.com/v1/models/{slug}/predictions`
   111→**Headers:** `Authorization: Bearer {token}`, `Prefer: wait=60`
   112→
   113→### Vídeo
   114→
   115→| Key | Slug | Tipo | Duração típica | Custo |
   116→|---|---|---|---|---|
   117→| `wan-t2v-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-t2v-480p` | T2V | ~30s geração | $ |
   118→| `wan-5b-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-t2v-720p` | T2V | ~60s geração | $$ |
   119→| `hailuo-02` | `minimax/hailuo-02` | T2V | ~45s geração | $$ |
   120→| `seedance-lite` | `bytedance/seedance-1-lite` | T2V | ~60s geração | $$ |
   121→| `runway-gen4` | `runwayml/gen4-turbo` | T2V | ~30s geração | $$$ |
   122→| `wan-i2v-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-i2v-480p` | I2V | ~45s geração | $ |
   123→
   124→**Endpoint vídeo:** `POST https://api.replicate.com/v1/models/{slug}/predictions` (sem `Prefer: wait`)
   125→**Polling:** `GET https://api.replicate.com/v1/predictions/{id}` a cada 3s
   126→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.text:
## Review Result

✅ **Spec Compliant**

The file `/root/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md` meets all requirements:

**Frontmatter:**
- ✅ `name: fabrica-de-criativos`
- ✅ `description:` starts with "Use when..." and covers the skill scope

**5 Specialists (all present with complete structure):**
1. ✅ **Anúncios** — Quando usar, Estrutura canônica, Vocabulário, Evitar, Exemplo (simples → expandido)
2. ✅ **Criativo** (Conteúdo Criativo) — all sections complete
3. ✅ **Psicodélico** — all sections complete
4. ✅ **Pessoas Realistas** — all sections complete
5. ✅ **Cena/Ambiente** — all sections complete

**Model References:**
- ✅ 5 image models: flux-1.1-pro, flux-dev, recraft-v3, ideogram-v3-turbo, imagen-4
- ✅ 6 video models: wan-t2v-fast, wan-5b-fast, hailuo-02, seedance-lite, runway-gen4, wan-i2v-fast

**Technical Details:**
- ✅ Endpoint reference: POST https://api.replicate.com/v1/models/{slug}/predictions
- ✅ Polling instructions: GET with 3s interval
- ✅ Headers: Authorization Bearer token, Prefer: wait=60 for images
- ✅ Headers: no Prefer: wait for videos

**Quality:**
- Prompts are well-structured with practical vocabulary
- Examples follow the simple → expandido expansion pattern
- All canonical structures fit the 50–120 word target
- Portuguese input, English output pattern enforced

No issues found.
